hero.label: Made for Alpha Vantage
hero.headline: I want to help Alpha Vantage convert the AI/MCP wave into revenue.
hero.subheadline: Alpha Vantage just launched an MCP server that lets developers pipe live market data directly into Claude and Cursor. That is a massive distribution moment. I want to be the person who turns developer curiosity into paying customers.

whyCompany.title: The MCP server launch opens a brand new acquisition channel
whyCompany.body: Now that developers can access Alpha Vantage through Claude, Cursor, and VS Code, the top-of-funnel just got 10x wider. Someone needs to own that pipeline — building developer community, content, and outbound to turn users into enterprise customers. That is a Growth Manager job I am ready for.

whyCompany.title: Profitable, bootstrapped-style company with real distribution
whyCompany.body: Alpha Vantage serves billions of daily market data requests and has been building for 8 years. That kind of foundation means a Growth Manager role here has real leverage — not chasing PMF, but accelerating a working business into new customer segments.

whyCompany.title: My B2B background transfers directly to developer-led growth
whyCompany.body: At Copygen.ai I ran outbound campaigns targeting technical buyers. At NextAfter I worked in a consultancy serving nonprofits via data-driven digital marketing. Both taught me how to move buyers who care about ROI and integrations — exactly the Alpha Vantage customer.

quote: The intersection of financial data APIs and AI tooling is one of the hottest spots in developer infrastructure right now. I want to help Alpha Vantage capture that moment — not just watch it from the sidelines.
